---
title: "Talks & Presentations"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

Below is a selection of conference presentations and invited talks.

## 2022

**Changes in compound monthly precipitation and temperature extremes and their relationship with teleconnection patterns in the Mediterranean**  
*EGU General Assembly 2022*, Vienna / Online  
[Abstract](https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-egu22-XXXX)

---

## 2021

**Characterisation of Extreme Precipitation Events in the Pyrenees. From the Local to the Synoptic Scale**  
*10th International Conference on Climate and Water*, Tampere, Finland

**Assessing internal changes in the future structure of dry–hot compound events in the Pyrenees**  
*EGU General Assembly 2021*, Online  

---

## 2019

**synoptReg: An R package for computing a synoptic climate classification and spatial regionalization**  
*Jornades Catalanes de Climatologia*, Barcelona, Spain

**Combining circulation weather types and daily precipitation modelling to derive climatic precipitation regions in the Pyrenees**  
*International Conference of Alpine Meteorology (ICAM) 2019*, Innsbruck, Austria

---

## 2018

**A mixed application of an objective synoptic classification and spatial regression models for deriving winter precipitation regimes in the Eastern Pyrenees**  
*13th Annual Meeting of the European Meteorological Society (EMS)*, Budapest, Hungary
